user.title: Trakt Scrobbler Configuration
user.description:
To configure Trakt Scrobbler, you need to create an app on Trakt:

1. Go to {trakt_app_url}
2. Create a new app
3. Set the redirect URI to: `urn:ietf:wg:oauth:2.0:oob`
4. Copy your Client ID and Client Secret

device.title: Activate Device
device.description:
To complete setup:

1. Visit: **{verification_url}**
2. Enter code: **{user_code}**
3. Click Submit below after authorizing

data.name: Integration Name
data.check_entity: Only scrobble when these entities allow it
